ai_chat.query: Make important point marks in note form for easier read

response.content: Overview of Bryn Bower Environmental Issue:
Bryn Bower has faced groundwater contamination due to leakages from Hallman Inc.'s lagoons between 1965 and 1980. Exafluoran, the primary contaminant, is considered a probable human carcinogen.

response.title: Map of Bryn Bower indicating the contaminated areas
response.description: Highlights the extent of Exafluoran pollution especially around critical areas like downtown and Bryn East.

content: 30% of the city including downtown is affected by water prohibition due to high contamination levels.
Concentration of pollution in Bryn Hill and surrounding areas lies between 3-20 ppb.

response.title: Leaked Confidential Hallman Cleanup Cost Estimates
response.description: Detailed analysis of cleanup costs, projected outcomes, and strategic recommendations by Hydrogeology experts.

content: Cost of complete cleanup exceeds $300M, deemed unsustainable.
Recommended focusing on certain areas and bolstering city water supply.

response.title: Tumultuous Town Hall Meeting on Bryn Bower Plume Scandal
response.description: Public reaction and commentary during a heated townhall meeting about Hallman's proposal to manage pollution cleanup.

content: Community deeply divided; significant distrust towards Hallman Inc.
Proposed $19M solution to connect affected homes to municipal water met with both support and severe criticism.
